title: 1x Camshaft Adjustment Valve VCT Solenoid 11367604292 11367587760 V758776080 for Citroën C3 C4 Cooper R56 R57 Peugeot 207 307 208 308, Timing Control Solenoid Valve VVT Cam Phaser Actuator
features: 1.Fitment: BMW 1 Series (F20/F21 2010–2019), BMW 3 Series (F30/F31/F80 2011–2019) and MINI (R55–R61, R56–R59 2006–2016). Also suits selected PSA models with 1.6T engines — Peugeot 207/208/2008/308/408/508 and Citroën DS5/DS9. Ideal VVT/camshaft oil control valve replacement.

2.Key OEM / cross‑reference numbers: BMW/MINI OE 11367604292, 11367587760, 11368610388, 11367564734; PSA OE 1922.R7 / V758776080; GM/OPEL refs 03639451 / 095525930. Fits VVT camshaft solenoid / oil control valve applications.
3. Attention during verification: Ensure that you check the model, year of manufacture, and OEM number of your vehicle to guarantee a perfect fit and optimal function.
4. 3 Months Warranty: Buy with confidence! We offer a 3-month warranty for this solenoid valve. If defects occur, repairs or replacements can be arranged.

5. Fast customer support: Do you have questions? Contact us within 12 hours and we will respond to your email! Technical support is available for all clarifications regarding installation and compatibility.

CITROËN C4 Spacetourer Box Body / Estate (3D_) (Year of Construction 04.2018 - ...) 2 pins Identical to your previous product – you can use it effortlessly without any additional learning effort. 1. Compatible with BMW and related models including F20, F21, F30, F31, F80, R55, R56, R60, R58, R59, R61, and R56, R55, R60 Mini models from 2006 to 2019, as well as Citroën DS5, C3 III, Peugeot 207, 208, 2008, and Opel/Vauxhall vehicles. 2. Features high-quality VVT (Variable Valve Timing) solenoid valves with OE numbers 11367604292, 11367587760, and 11368610388, ensuring precise engine control and optimal performance. 3. Designed for easy installation and reliable operation, these VVT solenoid valves are suitable for controlling oil flow in the engine's variable valve timing system. 4. Original equipment matching OE numbers such as 7 564 734, 7 566 652, 7 587 760, and 8 610 388, guaranteeing compatibility and high standards of quality. 5. Ideal for maintaining engine efficiency and performance across a range of BMW petrol engines including 114i, 116i, 118i, 120i, 316i, and more, with precise control over variable valve timing systems.
